commands.purpose: List platform languages or tenant-enabled locales. --enabled-only filters to TenantLocale.is_enabled=true.
Print the resolution trace for one key: file lookup + DB tenant override + DB platform default + fallback chain. Useful for debugging missing translations.
Translate one key. --force retranslates even when a cached row exists.
Pre-populate Redis LRU cache with top-N keys per locale.
Dispatch a BulkTranslateNamespaceJob for a tenant + set of target locales.

Seed the platform_languages catalogue from data/platform-languages.json. Each row resolves geography_language_id + optional geography_country_id via lookup against the vendor-seeded geography rows (nnjeim/world). --refresh upserts + preserves is_active_on_platform overrides. Requires geography module + `php artisan world:install` to have run first.
Run reconciliation now. --prune also purges stale rows.
